steps.title: Use the dash definition
steps.content: The phrase after the dash defines the missing word as "variations in size, shape, and material." The blank must therefore mean differences or lack of uniformity among microplastic particles.

steps.title: Reject wrong types of difference
steps.content: A means inability to coexist, not variation in properties. B means restrictions. C means interruptions or disturbances, not differences in size, shape, and material. The answer is D.
